sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23061" key="gunaiko/yuxos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γῠναικό-ψῡχος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n23061.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of womanish soul,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg022:228" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Par.Ptol.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">228</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
